_doc: Single source of truth for the project's ES module import map. Consumed by /index.html and /builderworkshop/index.html via scripts/sync-importmaps.cjs. URLs are local /vendor/* paths (mirroring node_modules layout) populated by scripts/vendor-deps.cjs on each predev/prestart/prebuild run. To bump a package version: run `npm install <pkg>`, then `npm run vendor:deps && npm run sync:importmaps`.
